hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】会议纪要显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年降息；【FINANCE】Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击威胁到不稳定的美伊停火。

items.title: Fed officials still foresee rate cut this year, despite war impacts, minutes show
items.summary: Policymakers said they would need to remain "nimble" as they weighed the impact the war had on inflation.
items.title_zh: 会议纪要显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年降息
items.summary_zh: 政策制定者表示，在权衡战争对通胀的影响时，他们需要保持“灵活”。

items.title: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.summary: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
items.title_zh: Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.summary_zh: Visa 的新工具是主要银行和金融机构将人工智能融入其业务的更大努力的一部分。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Israeli Strikes in Lebanon Threaten Shaky U.S.-Iran Cease-Fire
items.summary: Lebanon was in mourning after Israeli forces killed at least 182 people in strikes against Hezbollah, the Iran-backed militant group, on Wednesday. Disagreements have surfaced over whether the cease-fire applies to Lebanon.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击威胁到不稳定的美伊停火
items.summary_zh: 以色列军队周三对伊朗支持的激进组织真主党发动袭击，造成至少 182 人死亡，黎巴嫩陷入哀悼。关于停火是否适用于黎巴嫩的分歧已经浮出水面。

items.title: The ‘bottom is in’: Why Tom Lee says the Iran ceasefire is the starting gun for a massive bitcoin rally
items.summary: The Fundstrat co-founder and largest corporate ether buyer on earth said the ceasefire means the worst is over. His company bought 71,252 ETH last week.
items.title_zh: “底部已经到来”：为什么汤姆·李说伊朗停火是比特币大规模反弹的发令枪
items.summary_zh: Fundstrat 联合创始人、全球最大的企业以太币买家表示，停火意味着最糟糕的时期已经过去。他的公司上周购买了 71,252 ETH。

items.title: Bitcoin's next big move hinges on oil, and right now it's a total coin flip
items.summary: Analysts say a sustained 15%–16% decline in crude could revive Fed rate cut bets, sending BTC higher.
items.title_zh: 比特币的下一个重大举措取决于石油，而现在这完全是硬币翻转
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，原油价格持续下跌 15% 至 16% 可能会重振美联储降息押注，从而推高比特币价格。

items.title: Bitcoin under $71,000, ETH, SOL, XRP drop as Iran ceasefire frays within 48 hours of being signed
items.summary: Tehran says three clauses of the ceasefire have been breached, oil is rebounding toward $97, and the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed despite the deal.
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗停火协议在签署后 48 小时内破裂，比特币跌破 71,000 美元，ETH、SOL、XRP 下跌
items.summary_zh: 德黑兰表示，停火协议的三项条款已被违反，油价反弹至 97 美元，尽管达成协议，霍尔木兹海峡实际上仍处于关闭状态。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
items.summary: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
items.summary_zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

items.title: Iran ceasefire deal gives Trump a way out of war - but at a high cost
items.summary: The path to the two-week ceasefire with Iran may have fundamentally altered the way the rest of the world views the US.
items.title_zh: 伊朗停火协议为特朗普提供了摆脱战争的出路 - 但代价高昂
items.summary_zh: 与伊朗达成为期两周的停火的道路可能从根本上改变了世界其他国家对美国的看法。

items.title: At least 182 killed across Lebanon in large wave of Israeli strikes
items.summary: Attacks hit the southern suburbs of Beirut, southern Lebanon and the eastern Bekaa Valley, hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.
items.title_zh: 以色列大规模袭击造成黎巴嫩全境至少182人死亡
items.summary_zh: 在美伊宣布停火数小时后，贝鲁特南郊、黎巴嫩南部和贝卡谷地东部发生袭击。

items.title: He's Australia's most decorated soldier. Now he's at the centre of a historic war crimes case
items.summary: Ben Roberts-Smith's case is not only unprecedented for Australia but "extraordinary" for the globe too, scholars say.
items.title_zh: 他是澳大利亚获得勋章最多的士兵。现在他处于历史性战争罪案件的中心
items.summary_zh: 学者们表示，本·罗伯茨-史密斯的案件不仅对澳大利亚来说是史无前例的，对全球来说也是“非同寻常”的。

items.title: How War in the Middle East Paralyzed an Asian Food Giant
items.summary: Vietnam, the world’s No. 2 rice exporter, cut production as power prices surged. Even with a temporary cease-fire in Iran, worries linger over the world’s food supply.
items.title_zh: 中东战争如何让亚洲食品巨头陷入瘫痪
items.summary_zh: 世界第二大米出口国越南因电价飙升而减产。即使伊朗暂时停火，人们对世界粮食供应的担忧依然存在。

items.title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
items.summary: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 另类华尔街研究公司表示，已派出一名分析师前往霍尔木兹海峡。这是他们学到的
items.summary_zh: 在美国和以色列对伊朗发动战争之前，世界上大约 20% 的石油是通过狭窄的霍尔木兹海峡运输的。

items.title: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
items.summary: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.
items.title_zh: 我们对美国和伊朗之间为期两周的停火了解多少
items.summary_zh: 临时休战是在美国和以色列对伊朗发动协同袭击一个多月后达成的。

items.title: Strategy’s STRC sees one of its highest volume days, with just one penny of volatility
items.summary: High yield structure keeps STRC pinned at par while enabling large scale bitcoin purchases.
items.title_zh: Strategy 的 STRC 迎来成交量最高的日子之一，波动性仅为一美分
items.summary_zh: 高收益结构使 STRC 保持不变，同时实现大规模比特币购买。

items.title: Everyone’s awaiting U.S. inflation figures, but bitcoin traders couldn’t care less
items.summary: There’s a wide gap between how experts are viewing Friday’s inflation data and how the bitcoin market is pricing in the impending figures.
items.title_zh: 每个人都在等待美国通胀数据，但比特币交易者并不在乎
items.summary_zh: 专家们对周五通胀数据的看法与比特币市场对即将到来的数据的定价之间存在巨大差距。

items.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs post net outflows despite $31 million inflows into Morgan Stanley’s MSBT
items.summary: Institutions appear to be taking profits from the bitcoin rally rather than joining the momentum, one analyst said.
items.title_zh: 尽管有 3100 万美元流入摩根士丹利的 MSBT，但现货比特币 ETF 仍出现净流出
items.summary_zh: 一位分析师表示，机构似乎是从比特币上涨中获利了结，而不是加入这一势头。

items.title: Morgan Stanley’s MSBT bitcoin ETF logs $34 million in first-day volume
items.summary: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust's first-day volume exceeded the $30 million estimate from Bloomberg Senior Analyst Eric Balchunas.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利的 MSBT 比特币 ETF 首日成交量达 3400 万美元
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利比特币信托首日交易量超过了彭博社高级分析师埃里克·巴尔丘纳斯 (Eric Balchunas) 估计的 3000 万美元。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
items.title_zh: 通过鱼类监测的计算机视觉增强公民科学
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院海洋格兰特与伍德韦尔气候研究中心和其他合作者合作，展示了一种基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统。

items.title: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
items.summary: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."
items.title_zh: 在要求水平过高后，Blue Owl 将私人信贷基金赎回上限限制在 5%
items.summary_zh: Blue Owl 将高于平常的请求归因于“市场对人工智能相关软件公司中断的担忧加剧”。

items.title: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
items.summary: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特称伊朗炸弹将使核灾难更难以避免
items.summary_zh: 这位伯克希尔哈撒韦公司董事长表示，越来越多的核武器国家从根本上改变了全球风险格局。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he's still making calls on investments at Berkshire, flags 'tiny' new buy
items.summary: The 95-year-old investor said he still comes into the office daily and stays engaged with markets.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他仍在呼吁伯克希尔的投资，并表示“小规模”新收购
items.summary_zh: 这位 95 岁的投资者表示，他仍然每天来到办公室并与市场保持联系。

items.title: Trump criticises Nato as alliance chief describes meeting as 'very frank'
items.summary: The US president says Nato "wasn't there when we needed them" during the Iran war.
items.title_zh: 特朗普批评北约，联盟主席称会面“非常坦诚”
items.summary_zh: 美国总统表示，在伊朗战争期间，北约“在我们需要的时候不在场”。

items.title: Prosecutors seek Tiger Woods' prescription drug records after Florida arrest
items.summary: A legal order seeking the golfer's medications - including dosage and warnings about driving on pill bottles - will be issued later this month, court record shows.
items.title_zh: 检察官在佛罗里达州被捕后寻找泰格·伍兹的处方药记录
items.summary_zh: 法庭记录显示，一项法律命令将于本月晚些时候发布，要求这名高尔夫球手服用药物，包括剂量和使用药瓶驾驶的警告。

items.title: Greece to ban social media for under-15s from next year
items.summary: It follows similar moves in other European countries, including France and Spain.
items.title_zh: 希腊明年起禁止15岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
items.summary_zh: 法国和西班牙等其他欧洲国家也采取了类似举措。

items.title: Germany suspends military approval for long stays abroad for men under 45
items.summary: The requirement to obtain permission had gone largely unnoticed until a German newspaper reported on it.
items.title_zh: 德国暂停军方批准 45 岁以下男性长期居留国外
items.summary_zh: 直到一家德国报纸对此进行报道之前，获得许可的要求基本上没有引起人们的注意。

items.title: Pioneering wildlife cameraman Doug Allan dies in Nepal
items.summary: The cameraman and photographer won eight Emmy Awards for his work on acclaimed series like Blue Planet alongside Sir David Attenborough.
items.title_zh: 野生动物摄影师先驱道格·艾伦在尼泊尔去世
items.summary_zh: 这位摄影师兼摄影师因与大卫·阿滕伯勒爵士合作拍摄《蓝色星球》等广受好评的剧集而荣获八项艾美奖。

items.title: What to Know About the U.S.-Iran Cease-Fire
items.summary: The two-week truce agreement already seems to be on shaky ground over two issues, the Strait of Hormuz and the status of Lebanon.
items.title_zh: 关于美国-伊朗停火需要了解什么
items.summary_zh: 为期两周的停战协议似乎已经在霍尔木兹海峡和黎巴嫩地位两个问题上岌岌可危。

items.title: Greece Plans to Block Social Media for Children Under 15
items.summary: Countries including Australia, Spain and others have already passed bans or are working on plans to restrict teenagers’ access to social sites.
items.title_zh: 希腊计划屏蔽 15 岁以下儿童的社交媒体
items.summary_zh: 澳大利亚、西班牙等国家已经通过禁令或正在制定限制青少年访问社交网站的计划。

items.title: CFTC presses case that sports betting is finance, seeks to block Arizona enforcement
items.summary: Federal lawsuit argues event contracts are swaps under U.S. law, not state-level gaming law, deepening a split with states that view the products as illegal gambling
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 强调体育博彩属于金融，试图阻止亚利桑那州的执法
items.summary_zh: 联邦诉讼称，根据美国法律，赛事合同属于互换，而不是州级博彩法，这加深了与将这些产品视为非法赌博的州的分歧

items.title: XRP slips 4% as selling pressure builds despite ETF inflows
items.summary: Elevated volume and modest institutional buying fail to support price, with sellers continuing to dominate near resistance.
items.title_zh: 尽管 ETF 资金流入，但由于抛售压力增大，XRP 仍下跌 4%
items.summary_zh: 成交量增加和机构买盘温和未能支撑价格，卖方继续在阻力位附近占据主导地位。

items.title: Bitcoin gets its first working prototype of quantum-resistant wallet rescue tool
items.summary: Lightning Labs CTO Olaoluwa Osuntokun demos a prototype that could prevent millions of wallets from being frozen under a future quantum-defense upgrade
items.title_zh: 比特币获得了第一个抗量子钱包救援工具的工作原型
items.summary_zh: 闪电实验室首席技术官 Olaoluwa Osuntokun 演示了一个原型，可以防止数百万钱包在未来的量子防御升级中被冻结

items.title: Canary Capital files spot PEPE ETF application with SEC
items.summary: Last year, Canary also filed an application to list a fund tracking the price of MOG, a then lesser-known memecoin.
items.title_zh: Canary Capital 向 SEC 提交现货 PEPE ETF 申请
items.summary_zh: 去年，Canary 还提交了一项申请，要求列出一只追踪 MOG 价格的基金，MOG 是一种当时鲜为人知的模因币。

items.title: The next phase of enterprise AI
items.summary: OpenAI outlines the next phase of enterprise AI, as adoption accelerates across industries with Frontier, ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and company-wide AI agents.
items.title_zh: 企业人工智能的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了企业人工智能的下一阶段，随着 Frontier、ChatGPT Enterprise、Codex 和全公司人工智能代理的跨行业采用加速。

items.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN
items.summary: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN 是为了加速围绕人工智能的全球对话并支持独立媒体，扩大与建筑商、企业和更广泛的技术社区的对话。

items.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
items.summary: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.
items.title_zh: Gradient Labs 为每一位银行客户提供人工智能客户经理
items.summary_zh: Gradient Labs 使用 GPT-4.1 和 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 为 AI 代理提供支持，以低延迟和高可靠性自动化银行支持工作流程。

items.title: Liberate your OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 解放你的 OpenClaw

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
items.title_zh: 人工智能系统学习保持仓库机器人交通平稳运行
items.summary_zh: 这种新方法可以随时决定哪些机器人应该获得通行权，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量。

items.title: Bithumb moves to seize assets over mistaken $8 million bitcoin dispute
items.summary: On Feb. 6, staff mistakenly entered "BTC" instead of "KRW" in a promotion, crediting roughly 620,000 bitcoin worth over $40 billion.
items.title_zh: Bithumb 因错误的 800 万美元比特币纠纷而采取行动扣押资产
items.summary_zh: 2 月 6 日，工作人员在促销活动中错误地输入了“BTC”而不是“KRW”，赠送了大约 62 万个比特币，价值超过 400 亿美元。

items.title: Bhutan moves $23 million worth of bitcoin; total holdings down 70% from peak
items.summary: One of the recipient wallets had previously been used to route funds for selling via Galaxy Digital and OKX, Onchain Lens said.
items.title_zh: 不丹转移了价值 2300 万美元的比特币；总持仓量较峰值下降70%
items.summary_zh: Onchain Lens 表示，其中一个接收钱包此前曾被用来转移资金，通过 Galaxy Digital 和 OKX 进行销售。

items.title: Bithumb turns to legal action to recover lost bitcoin in ‘fat finger’ incident: report
items.summary: Most recipients of the 'fat finger' error have voluntarily returned the bitcoin, but some insisted they are not obligated to do so.
items.title_zh: Bithumb 诉诸法律诉讼以追回“胖手指”事件中丢失的比特币：报告
items.summary_zh: 大多数“胖手指”错误的接收者都自愿归还了比特币，但有些人坚称他们没有义务这样做。

items.title: Bitcoin Depot reveals $3.7 million stolen from company wallets in security breach
items.summary: The crypto ATM operator has suffered a security breach that resulted in 50.9 BTC being drained from its company wallets.
items.title_zh: Bitcoin Depot 透露公司钱包因安全漏洞被盗 370 万美元
items.summary_zh: 这家加密 ATM 运营商遭遇安全漏洞，导致 50.9 BTC 从其公司钱包中被盗。

items.title: Announcing the OpenAI Safety Fellowship
items.summary: A pilot program to support independent safety and alignment research and develop the next generation of talent
items.title_zh: 宣布 OpenAI 安全奖学金
items.summary_zh: 支持独立安全和对准研究并培养下一代人才的试点计划

items.title: Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165
items.title_zh: 训练 25 个物种的 mRNA 语言模型，仅需 165 美元

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: Ray Dalio: Trump-Xi meeting to focus on trade, capital flows
items.summary: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.
items.title_zh: 雷·达里奥：特习会聚焦贸易和资本流动
items.summary_zh: 桥水基金创始人雷·达里奥 (Ray Dalio) 告诉 CNBC，他对下个月中美两国元首会晤的结果持乐观态度。

items.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙在年度信中提到了地缘政治、人工智能和私募市场的风险
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 在致股东的年度信中提到了美国成立 250 周年，并呼吁对美国理想做出广泛的重新承诺。

items.title: Huawei's cloud computing revenue dropped in 2025 as Chinese AI lagged U.S. rivals
items.summary: When including internal customers, the telecommunications giant said cloud computing revenue grew from a year ago.
items.title_zh: 中国人工智能落后美国竞争对手，华为2025年云计算收入下降
items.summary_zh: 当包括内部客户时，这家电信巨头表示云计算收入较一年前有所增长。

items.title: Artemis crew returning to Earth with 'all the good stuff' from Moon discoveries
items.summary: The four astronauts said they were returning to Earth with "so many more pictures, so many more stories".
items.title_zh: 阿耳忒弥斯船员带着月球发现的“所有好东西”返回地球
items.summary_zh: 四名宇航员表示，他们带着“更多的照片、更多的故事”返回地球。

items.title: A Cease-Fire for Now in Iran, but a Blow to American Credibility
items.summary: Critics wonder if this is America’s “Suez moment,” when a leading power signals the start of its international decline.
items.title_zh: 伊朗暂时停火，但对美国信誉的打击
items.summary_zh: 批评者怀疑这是否是美国的“苏伊士时刻”，即一个领先大国标志着其国际衰落的开始。

items.title: The Hit Erotica Writers Outwitting Nigeria’s Religious Censors
items.summary: Zealous officials burned their predecessors’ romance novels. Now, young Muslim women in northern Nigeria publish their erotic books in installments on WhatsApp.
items.title_zh: 热门情色作家智取尼日利亚宗教审查
items.summary_zh: 热心的官员烧毁了前任的言情小说。现在，尼日利亚北部的年轻穆斯林妇女在 WhatsApp 上分期出版她们的色情书籍。

items.title: He Made a Gadget to Amuse Pets. Then He Turned to Killer Drones.
items.summary: An entrepreneur behind drones that make the final strike themselves epitomizes the transformation of Ukraine’s civilian technology industry into a defense powerhouse.
items.title_zh: 他制作了一个逗宠物的小玩意。然后他转向杀手无人机。
items.summary_zh: 一位无人机背后的企业家可以自己进行最后的打击，这就是乌克兰民用技术产业向国防强国转变的缩影。

items.title: In Germany’s East, the Far Right Could Soon Take Power. This Is Its Plan.
items.summary: In the eastern state of Saxony-Anhalt, the Alternative for Germany could win control of the government this fall. Once in power, it has a plan to overhaul German society.
items.title_zh: 在德国东部，极右翼势力很快就会掌权。这就是它的计划。
items.summary_zh: 在东部萨克森-安哈尔特州，德国另类选择党可能会在今年秋天赢得政府控制权。一旦掌权，它就有一项改革德国社会的计划。

items.title: No, Britain Is Not Having a Christian Revival
items.summary: A study said church attendance had soared among British young people, a trend reversal that excited religious conservatives around the world. Turns out it wasn’t true.
items.title_zh: 不，英国没有基督教复兴
items.summary_zh: 一项研究称，英国年轻人去教堂的次数猛增，这一趋势逆转令世界各地的宗教保守派兴奋不已。事实证明这不是真的。

items.title: He Got Rich Buying and Selling Luxury Watches. Was It a Ponzi Scheme?
items.summary: Dominic Khoo made waves in Singapore as an investor in expensive timepieces. Now many of his clients accuse him of fraud.
items.title_zh: 他通过买卖名贵手表致富。这是庞氏骗局吗？
items.summary_zh: 多米尼克·邱 (Dominic Khoo) 作为昂贵钟表的投资者在新加坡引起了轰动。现在他的许多客户指控他欺诈。

items.title: Iran's crypto tanker tolls are the latest step in its sanctions‑busting trade network
items.summary: The Iranian regime has been increasingly using cryptocurrency over the last few years to facilitate cross border oil trading, according to data from Chainalysis.
items.title_zh: 伊朗的加密货币油轮通行费是其违反制裁的贸易网络​​的最新举措
items.summary_zh: 根据 Chainaanalysis 的数据，过去几年，伊朗政权越来越多地使用加密货币来促进跨境石油交易。

items.title: Crypto card boom hits $600 million monthly volume as USDC gains ground on USDT
items.summary: Stablecoin composition of card volume is worth watching as a proxy for geographic and demographic shifts in users.
items.title_zh: 随着 USDC 超越 USDT，加密卡热潮每月交易量达到 6 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 卡数量的稳定币构成值得关注，可以作为用户地理和人口统计变化的指标。

items.title: Bored Ape Yacht Club maker Yuga Labs settles with ‘expressive appropriation artist’ Ryder Ripps in long-running trademark case
items.summary: Bored Ape Yacht Club maker Yuga Labs and the defendants Ripps and business partner Jeremy Cahen have agreed to settle.
items.title_zh: Bored Ape Yacht Club 制造商 Yuga Labs 与“富有表现力的挪用艺术家”Ryder Ripps 就长期商标案达成和解
items.summary_zh: Bored Ape Yacht Club 制造商 Yuga Labs 以及被告 Ripps 和商业伙伴 Jeremy Cahen 已同意和解。

items.title: Polygon Labs seeking to raise up to $100 million for stablecoin payments business: report
items.summary: The crypto firm aims to sell "between $50 million and $100 million in equity" in the new stablecoin payments business.
items.title_zh: Polygon Labs 寻求为稳定币支付业务筹集最多 1 亿美元：报告
items.summary_zh: 该加密货币公司的目标是在新的稳定币支付业务中出售“5000万至1亿美元的股权”。

items.title: SEC appoints David Woodcock as new enforcement director amid concerns over previous lead, agency’s crypto cases
items.summary: The SEC has appointed a new enforcement director following the departure of its former chief, a transition that raised concerns.
items.title_zh: SEC 任命 David Woodcock 为新任执法总监，原因是对该机构之前的加密案件的担忧
items.summary_zh: 在前任主席离职后，美国证券交易委员会任命了一位新的执法总监，这一过渡引发了担忧。

items.title: Introducing the Child Safety Blueprint
items.summary: Discover OpenAI’s Child Safety Blueprint—a roadmap for building AI responsibly with safeguards, age-appropriate design, and collaboration to protect and empower young people online.
items.title_zh: 儿童安全蓝图简介
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的儿童安全蓝图——通过保障措施、适合年龄的设计和协作来负责任地构建 AI 的路线图，以保护和增强上网年轻人的能力。

items.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.
items.title_zh: 智能时代的产业政策
items.summary_zh: 探索我们在人工智能时代雄心勃勃、以人为本的产业政策理念——重点是随着先进智能的发展，扩大机会、共享繁荣，并建立有弹性的机构。

items.title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
items.summary: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.
items.title_zh: Codex 现在为团队提供更灵活的定价
items.summary_zh: Codex 现在包括 ChatGPT 商业版和企业版的即用即付定价，为团队提供更灵活的选择来启动和扩展采用。

items.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
items.summary: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.
items.title_zh: 加速人工智能的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 筹集了 1220 亿美元的新资金，用于在全球范围内扩展前沿人工智能，投资下一代计算，并满足对 ChatGPT、Codex 和企业人工智能不断增长的需求。

items.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
items.summary: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
items.title_zh: 帮助救灾团队将人工智能转化为亚洲各地的行动
items.summary_zh: 亚洲救灾人工智能：与盖茨基金会合作的 OpenAI 研讨会

items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
items.title_zh: STADLER 重塑一家拥有 230 年历史的公司的知识工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 STADLER 如何使用 ChatGPT 来转变知识工作，从而节省 650 名员工的时间并提高工作效率。

items.title: ALTK‑Evolve: On‑the‑Job Learning for AI Agents
items.title_zh: ALTK‑Evolve：AI 代理的在职学习

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 即将加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Holo3: Breaking the Computer Use Frontier
items.title_zh: Holo3：打破计算机使用前沿

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Any Custom Frontend with Gradio's Backend
items.title_zh: 任何带有 Gradio 后端的自定义前端

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: TRL v1.0: Post-Training Library Built to Move with the Field
items.title_zh: TRL v1.0：专为随场移动而构建的训练后库

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。
